<?php /** * This code was generated by * \ / _ _ _| _ _ * | (_)\/(_)(_|\/| |(/_ v1.0.0 * / / */ namespace Twilio\TwiML\Voice; use Twilio\TwiML\TwiML; class Autopilot extends TwiML { /** * Autopilot constructor. * * @param string $name Autopilot assistant sid or unique name */ public function __construct($name) { parent::__construct('Autopilot', $name); } }
